voice.tone: Friendly and confident. Product-focused, not pushy.
voice.errors: Reassuring and solution-focused. If a payment fails, suggest alternatives. Never alarm the customer.
voice.loading: Show product card skeletons with image placeholders. Subtle shimmer animation to signal progress.
voice.empty_states: Warm and inviting. Suggest popular items or categories when a search returns no results. Keep the shopper browsing.
